description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The structure features a large main building with a smaller, elevated section, and is surrounded by a landscaped yard bordered with low shrubbery. The front area includes a paved path, a small garden with decorative stones, two trees, a bench, and a bicycle. On one side, there is a circular above-ground pool and a rectangular in-ground swimming pool with steps, both set on a wooden deck. The rear of the bungalow has large windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and access to the outdoor amenities. The exterior is finished in light gray, with wooden and glass accents visible on doors and windows.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a landscaped yard, pools, and minimalist design, featuring large windows and a mix of wood and glass accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved path, garden area, and both the circular and rectangular pools.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pools, deck area, and the elevated section of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garden, bench, bicycle, and the main door with two trees and decorative stones.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the deck, pools, and the side elevation of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
